detail: Count, read and write whole numbers up to at least 1000

Use estimation to check the reasonableness of answers
Apply rounding to estimate the result of addition and subtraction
Identify and describe the effect of rounding on an answer
Select and justify an appropriate level of accuracy for a given context
Use counting on to add small numbers

Use doubles and near-doubles as addition strategies

Use counting back to subtract small numbers
